name: Siemens NX
description: Enterprise-grade CAD/CAM/CAE platform from Siemens. Used by major aerospace manufacturers including SpaceX for advanced surface modelling, integrated simulation, and manufacturing process planning.
whyUseIt: NX combines CAD modelling, FEA simulation, and manufacturing toolpath generation in a single platform. This integrated workflow reduces errors when moving from design to analysis to production — critical in aerospace where a drawing error can cause a mission failure.

vocabulary.definition: Product Lifecycle Management — managing a product's data from concept through manufacturing to retirement
Algorithm that removes material from a design envelope, keeping only what is needed to carry loads

beginnerMistakes: Not leveraging the integrated simulation capabilities
Creating models that are not manufacturing-aware
Ignoring version control for collaborative projects
